subject: fix(pwa): render InstallPrompt on workspace manager landing page
body:
InstallPrompt was only rendered inside the active workspace view, so on
Android Chrome the beforeinstallprompt event captured by the inline
script in index.html was never consumed on the landing page. Users had
to enter a workspace and reload before the install banner appeared.

Tags: pwa, install, android, workspace-manager
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pwa-install
Semver: patch

title: render InstallPrompt on workspace manager landing page
